'''Pii III'''<ref name="Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] famous for the luxury [[Greel wood/Legends|greel wood]] that grew there. It was located in the [[Pii system/Legends|Pii system]] inside the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was one of "[[Teeda's Eyes]]." It averaged 105 [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]] of precipitation annually.

At one point, Pii III was the site of a [[Duro/Legends|Duros]] colony, which was later abandoned.<ref name="GWH" />

The [[Greel Wood Logging Corporation]] had a significant presence on the world. There was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell active on Pii III before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]; [[Adazian Liebke]] and [[Xenon Nnaksta]] were trying to gather supplies for this cell when they were attacked by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ssach'thirix]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
